goal: Implement an operator UI for memory ingestion issues, privacy audit issues, search index health, review actions and safe audit visibility.
global_constraints: Use accepted ADR-0017 as the implementation baseline.
Keep MemoryIngestionIssue as the primary review queue for MVP.
Do not introduce a persistent MemoryReviewCase in MVP; use selector-level ReviewQueueItem for unified UI lists.
Do not store full extracted document text in Django.
Do not expose raw secrets, raw PII or raw query values in UI, action logs, tests or documentation.
Do not provide force-index actions for documents where secrets were detected.
Use Django templates and HTMX first; do not build a separate SPA.
All state-changing UI actions must go through apps.memory services and create MemoryReviewAction.
Apply server-side permissions to issue, source object, search document and audit visibility.
Keep temporary e2e files and logs under .local/.
verification_commands: python manage.py test apps.memory.tests apps.settings_center.tests apps.ai.tests
